Notice Of Defts' & Cross-Complainants' Motion To Quash Pltf.'S Deposition Subpoenas; A Protective Order; And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Feb-04-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Cindy Lee, Esq., and Elizabeth Fung, Esq., for defendant and moving party: Kam Yan, Mihn Lam and Brian Yan
Karen L. Caldwell, Esq., for plaintiff and opposing party: Kom Fook Yan

After hearing, tentative ruling is adopted but modified. Defendant Kam Yan, Mihn Lam and Brian Yan's motion to quash deposition subpoena is granted.
Plaintiff may propound no more than 10 request fir admissions and special interrogatories in lieu of subpoenas. Plaintiff shall serve said written discovery on February 4, 2009, responses due February 18, 2009. All requests for monetary sanctions are denied. Judge: Bruce Chan. Not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defts To Provide Further Responses Topltf' Sfirst Set Of Requests For Production Of Documents, For An Order Requiring Deft To Pay Sanctions, Attorneys' Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Feb-04-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Karen L. Caldwell, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Kom Fook Yan and Victor Yan
Cindy Lee, Esq., and Elizabeth Fung, Esq., for Defendant and opposing party: Kam Yan, Mihn Lam and Brian Yan

After hearing, tentative ruling is adopted with modification. Plaintiff Kom Yan and Victor Yan's motion to compel further responses to request for production of documents is granted.
Defendant shall produce portions of tax returns from 2005-2007 relating to Lisbon and Silver properties. Defendant may redact other un-related inofrmation. In addition, defendant shall produce cancelled checks re: Libon Property for 2006 and 2007. All requests for monetary sanctions are denied. Judge: Bruce Chan. Not reported.

Notice Of Motion Andm Motion For Order Granting Leave To File First Amended Complaint To Add Additional Causes Of Action
Off Calendar Jan-02-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Karen L. Caldwell (290.0448) for plaintiffs and moving parties

No other appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFFS KOM YAN AND VICTOR YAN'S MOTION FOR ORDER GRANTING LEAVE TO FILE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT TO ADD ADDITIONAL CAUSES OF ACTION is granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open Court. (302/JEM) Judge: John E. Munter; Reporter: Rhonda Aquilina, CSR 956
